title: Correct Bench rollout governance metadata, classify all installed agent integrations as meaningful, and make Gemini create-change guidance shell-safe
description: Correct Bench rollout governance metadata, classify all installed agent integrations as meaningful, and make Gemini create-change guidance shell-safe
acceptance_criteria: The Bench changelog records version 2; all four installed agent directories are meaningful paths; Gemini guidance passes user intent as exactly one shell argument without adding a second quote layer; strict SpecSync coverage and native verification pass
